Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Your overview at a glance.

panels.noSessionsWaitingHint: New sessions arrive here as soon as Stage 1 finishes generating.
panels.nothingProcessingHint: Stage 2 enrichment runs on sessions you've started — once a recording lands, watch this space.

recent.title: Recent sessions
recent.noneYetHint: Start your first encounter from the iOS app to see it here.

findByIdentifier.title: Find by patient identifier
findByIdentifier.subtitle: Pull every encounter for a chart number, MRN, or RAMQ.

bulkExport.title: Bulk export
bulkExport.subtitle: Multi-select notes and download a zip of DOCX files.

newTemplate.title: New AI template
newTemplate.subtitle: Conversational template builder for a new specialty.

activity.title: Live activity
activity.allCaughtUpHint: New activity will appear here as it happens.

Dashboard.failedBanner: {count, plural, one {# session failed to process and needs attention.} other {# sessions failed to process and need attention.}}

Audit.title: My Activity
Audit.description: Audit-trail entries the system has recorded for your sessions. Filter and export to review what happened, when.
Audit.loadError: Couldn't load your audit log right now.
Audit.noMatches: No audit events match the current filters.
Audit.noMatchesHint: Try widening the date range or clearing the event-type filter.

MyActivity.tileHint: {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} in the last 7 days

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.emptyHint: New activity will appear here as it happens.

empty.title: Nothing matches
empty.hint: Type to search across navigation, sessions, and templates.
empty.hintForQuery: No results for “{query}”. Try a different term.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your Aurion account. We'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.confirmationBody: If that email is on file, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox in a few minutes.
forgotPassword.transportError: Couldn't reach Aurion right now. Check your network and try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a password you haven't used before. At least 8 characters.
resetPassword.missingTokenBody: This reset link is missing the token. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.tooLong: Password can't be longer than 128 characters.
errors.expiredHint: Your reset link may have expired. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.
errors.usedHint: This reset link has already been used. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.
errors.invalidHint: This reset link isn't valid. Double-check the link in the email, or request a new one.
errors.transport: Couldn't reach Aurion right now. Check your network and try again.

loginToast.resetSuccess: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.

ClipModal.title: Video clip
ClipModal.unavailable: Clip not yet available. The note may still be processing.
ClipModal.controls: Use video controls to play or pause.

badge.priorVisitsCount: {count, plural, one {# prior visit} other {# prior visits}}

PatientDetail.title: Patient encounters

subtitle.summary: {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} · first visit {first} · last visit {last}
subtitle.none: No encounters recorded yet for this identifier.

sessions.title: All encounters
sessions.empty: No encounters for this identifier yet
sessions.emptyHint: Sessions you record against this chart number, MRN, or RAMQ will appear here.

PatientDetail.loadFailed: Couldn't load encounters for this patient.

AIPrompts.title: AI Prompts
AIPrompts.subtitle: The exact instructions every AI model receives when analyzing your encounters.
AIPrompts.descriptiveModeCallout: Every prompt below enforces descriptive mode: the AI is told to describe what was captured, never to interpret, diagnose, or suggest clinical conclusions. This is the safety boundary Aurion's pilot operates under.
AIPrompts.phaseBHint: When you save your own prompt, it replaces the system default for your own sessions. The system default below is the fallback used when you haven't saved one.
AIPrompts.expandLabel: Show the exact instructions sent to the AI
AIPrompts.loadError: Couldn't load the AI prompts catalog.

userPrompt.confirmResetTitle: Use the system default for this prompt?
userPrompt.confirmResetMessage: Your saved prompt for this entry will be removed and the system default will run for your sessions.

editor.title: Edit your prompt
editor.systemDefaultLabel: System default (used when you haven't saved your own)
editor.yourPromptPlaceholder: You are a clinical documentation assistant. Describe only what was directly captured during the encounter. Document the patient's complaints and visible findings. Do not interpret findings, do not diagnose, and do not infer clinical meaning.
editor.activePromptLabel: Active prompt — what the AI will receive
editor.activePromptHint: Replaces the system default for your sessions when set
editor.activePromptIsDefault: Empty — the system default above will be used.
editor.requirementDescribe: Must include language like 'describe', 'document', 'record', or 'report what was observed'.
editor.requirementNoInterpret: Must include language like 'do not interpret', 'do not diagnose', or 'no interpretation'.
editor.requirementNoBannedPhrases: Cannot contain phrases that disable descriptive mode (e.g. 'you may diagnose', 'ignore previous instructions').

errors.tooLong: Your prompt is {count} characters — the maximum is {max}.
errors.bannedPhrase: Your prompt contains a phrase that would disable descriptive mode. Rephrase without telling the AI to interpret, diagnose, recommend treatment, or override prior rules. Matched phrase: {phrase}
errors.missingAnchorDescribe: Your prompt must tell the AI to describe / document / record what was observed. Add language like 'describe what was captured', 'document the patient's complaints', or 'record observed findings'.
errors.missingAnchorNoInterpret: Your prompt must tell the AI NOT to interpret, diagnose, or infer. Add language like 'do not interpret findings', 'do not diagnose', or 'no interpretation'.
errors.empty: Your prompt is empty. Either write a full prompt or use the system default.
errors.unknown: Couldn't validate your prompt. Try again.

FeatureFlags.title: Feature flags
FeatureFlags.subtitle: Toggle the post-pilot cards shown on the iOS note-review screen.
FeatureFlags.saveSuccess: Saved. Hosted version {version} is rolling out.
FeatureFlags.sectionCardsHint: These four cards appear under the SOAP note inside the iOS app. Each one is post-pilot scaffolding — leave hidden until the matching backend goes live. Changes apply within ~30 seconds across every iPhone.

orders_card_enabled.name: Orders
orders_card_enabled.description: Surfaces extracted prescriptions and orders below the SOAP note.

coding_card_enabled.name: Coding & Billing
coding_card_enabled.description: Assistive ICD/CPT suggestions for billing — never flow back into the clinical note.

patient_summary_card_enabled.name: Patient Summary
patient_summary_card_enabled.description: One-paragraph plain-language summary of the encounter.

emr_writeback_card_enabled.name: EMR Write-Back
emr_writeback_card_enabled.description: Outbound queue that sends the approved note to a chart system.

Providers.title: AI providers
Providers.subtitle: Switch which model provider serves each pipeline stage. Changes take effect at runtime (within ~10 seconds) — no redeploy. Every change is audited.

note_generation.name: Note generation
note_generation.description: The LLM that drafts the SOAP note (Stage 1 + Stage 2) and powers the template builder.

vision.name: Vision
vision.description: The model that describes captured frames and clips for visual enrichment.

transcription.name: Transcription
transcription.description: The speech-to-text engine that turns recorded audio into the transcript.

CapturedMedia.title: Captured media
CapturedMedia.subtitle: Sessions whose raw media is still inside the retention window.
CapturedMedia.retentionNote: Raw media is retained for {days} days, then removed by lifecycle policy. No patient identifiers are shown.
CapturedMedia.empty: No sessions with retained media in the current window.
CapturedMedia.notEnabledHint: Turn on the media review retention flag to retain and review raw session media.
CapturedMedia.viewOnly: View only. Downloading raw media is restricted to admins and the eval team.

Macros.title: Macros
Macros.description: Type a shortcut like /ros-cv during a note edit and it expands to the full phrase. Saves the boilerplate-typing tax.
Macros.deleteConfirm: Delete macro "{shortcut}"? This can't be undone (the audit log keeps a record).
Macros.emptyTitle: No macros yet. Add a few of your most-typed phrases to save real time during note review.

editor.shortcutHint: Starts with /; letters, digits, dashes, and underscores only (max 32 chars after the slash).
editor.bodyPlaceholder: The full phrase this shortcut expands to…
editor.specialtyHint: Leave on "All specialties" to expand the macro in every kind of note. Pick one to restrict it.

NotesList.title: My Notes
NotesList.description: Sessions you've recorded, with their generated notes.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.description: How Aurion configures recordings + note generation for you.

recording.title: Recording preferences
recording.retentionHint: How long recordings are kept on the device after export before automatic purge. Range 1–30 days.
recording.autoUploadHint: Upload audio immediately when you stop a session, rather than waiting for explicit confirmation.

custom.placeholder: e.g. LL new pt, breast visit

validation.ssn: That looks like a Social Security number.
validation.email: That looks like an email address.
validation.name: Avoid patient names — use a short label like "LL fu".

contexts.label: Visit-type contexts
contexts.description: Add contexts under a visit type (e.g. "left knee", "revision") and optionally pin each to a built-in template. Leave the template on your specialty default to inherit it.
contexts.noVisitTypes: Add a visit type above to attach contexts to it.

noteLanguage.title: Generated note language
noteLanguage.description: The language Aurion uses when generating notes from your transcripts. Independent of the portal interface language.

uiLanguage.title: Portal interface language
uiLanguage.description: The language used for the portal UI chrome — menus, buttons, and labels. Independent of the language used when generating notes.

security.title: Sign out
security.description: End your session on this device. Your other devices remain signed in — use the Active sessions card above to revoke them.

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add a second factor to protect your account. We support any TOTP authenticator app (Apple Passwords, 1Password, Google Authenticator).
mfa.statusEnrolledAria: MFA is enabled on this account
mfa.statusNotEnrolledAria: MFA is not enabled on this account

enroll.title: Enable multi-factor authentication
enroll.scanDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app. If you cannot scan, enter the secret manually.
enroll.recoveryCodesDescription: Save these one-time codes somewhere safe. You will not see them again. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.
enroll.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator to finish enrollment.
enroll.verifyError: Could not verify the code. Try again.

disable.title: Disable multi-factor authentication
disable.description: Enter a current code from your authenticator to confirm. Disabling MFA reduces the security of your account.
disable.error: Could not disable MFA. Check the code and try again.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices and browsers signed in to your account. Revoke any session you don't recognize.

TemplatesList.title: Templates
TemplatesList.description: Your custom note templates. Build a new one with the chat-style builder, or upload an existing template to have it extracted automatically.
TemplatesList.emptyTitle: No custom templates yet. Build one in a few minutes with the conversational builder.

TemplateNew.title: New template
TemplateNew.description: Build a custom note template — add its sections manually, or describe it and let the builder draft it.
TemplateNew.manualHint: Add the sections this note should have. Each section becomes a heading in the generated note; mark the ones that must always be filled as required.
TemplateNew.draftPlaceholder: The builder will draft your template here once you've confirmed the specialty, sections, and which are required.

TemplateDetail.editHint: Edit the template's sections directly. Save validates the result; reset discards your changes.
TemplateDetail.jsonHint: Edit the template JSON directly. Save validates against the schema; an invalid shape surfaces inline.

TemplateEditor.keyHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores — the stable id used to reference this template.
TemplateEditor.sectionDescriptionPlaceholder: What this section should capture — guides the note generator.
TemplateEditor.sectionKeywordsHint: Comma-separated. Used to route captured visuals to this section.
TemplateEditor.errKeyShape: Key must be lowercase letters, numbers and underscores (starting with a letter).
TemplateEditor.errKeyLong: Key is too long (50 characters max).
TemplateEditor.errNameLong: Template name is too long (100 characters max).
TemplateEditor.errSectionDesc: A section's guidance is too long (500 characters max).
TemplateEditor.errDuplicateId: Two sections share the same id — make each unique.
TemplateEditor.errTooManyKeywords: Too many keywords in a section (50 max).
TemplateEditor.errKeywordLong: A keyword is too long (50 characters max).

TemplateDraftPreview.triggerCount: {count, plural, one {# visual trigger} other {# visual triggers}}

NoteReview.noNoteHint: This session is still in capture or hasn't reached the review stage. Once recording stops and Stage 1 generation completes, the note will appear here.

conflicts.summary: {count, plural, one {# unresolved conflict.} other {# unresolved conflicts.}}
conflicts.blockedHint: Approval is blocked until every conflict is resolved.

recording.title: Encounter audio
recording.description: Replay the raw audio captured during this encounter. Playback only — the recording can't be downloaded.
recording.playerFallback: Your browser doesn't support audio playback.
recording.unavailable: Recording not available for this session.
recording.wrongState: Recording isn't available for this session yet.
recording.error: Couldn't load the recording. Please try again.

identifier.hint: Stored encrypted at rest, decrypted only for you. Use whatever scheme your clinic uses — MRN, encounter id, free text — so you can link this session back to the patient's prior visits.

validation.ssn: This looks like a social security number. Use a clinic identifier (MRN, encounter id) instead.
validation.email: This looks like an email address. Use a clinic identifier (MRN, encounter id) instead.
validation.name: This looks like a patient name. Use a clinic identifier (MRN, encounter id) instead.
validation.tooLong: Identifier must be 64 characters or fewer.
